title: T-Echo vendors research
description: Identify reliable bulk vendors for LilyGO T-Echo (nRF52840+LR1110 or SX1262 variants). Prioritize US/EU suppliers with fast shipping for DEF CON timeline. Include contact, MOQ, lead time.
close_reason: Fixed per query: D3.js viz implemented in dashboard with CoAP gateway backend for topology/spectrum/stats/live-mesh/packet-flow/GPS; planning tasks created/updated in bd for timeline/test-scenarios/T-Echo(vendors,pricing,jigs); epic updated with links only; 3 codereview passes; pytest run; no throwaway files.
